5 ?72 0011111000 5
4 ?61 0110001100 4
3 ?50 0111011110 7

Constant
5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch
5 C 5n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 7
5 I 7 0100001000 2 mismatch
5 I 7n 1011110111 8 mismatch

Unary 2
5 I 2 0111110000 5 mismatch
5 I 2n 1000001111 5 mismatch

Binary 72
5 AND 72 0100000000 1 mismatch
5 AND 72n 1011111111 9 mismatch
5 OR 72 0111111000 6 mismatch
5 OR 72n 1000000111 4 mismatch
5 XOR 72 0011111000 5 match 1/3
4 XOR 61 0110001100 4 match 2/3
3 XOR 50 0111011110 7 match 3/3
all match XOR 72 61 50
5 XOR 72n 1100000111 5 mismatch

3 0111011110 7
4 0110001100 4
5 0011111000 5
Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 1000110011 partial 0000010010 2
I 6 0101111001 partial 1100001010 4
I 7 0100001000 partial 1000001111 5
left 11
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 0111110000 partial 1011110111 8
I 1 0011110101 partial 1010000110 4
I 0 1111101101 partial 0111001100 5
right 17
Choosing right
3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 XOR 50
4 XOR 61
5 XOR 72
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10101001
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 1
3 XOR 50 = XOR(I 5,I 0) = XOR(0,1) = 1
4 XOR 61 = XOR(I 6,I 1) = XOR(0,0) = 0
5 XOR 72 = XOR(I 7,I 2) = XOR(1,1) = 0
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{10110001}
